prompt: Extreme macro of [food subject] at the moment of [destruction event] — [lens] locked at the point of maximum structural failure, the [food subject]'s internal architecture exposed: [interior detail] visible in cross-section, [light source] raking at a low angle catching every surface fracture and [texture detail], [color palette] the exact colours of this food at this moment, background falling to black, nothing but the food and what is happening to it, editorial food photography still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
